stemHtml: A pilot receives the following message from ATC: “D-NB, squawk 5412, climb to altitude 4500 ft”.What is the correct reply to this message?

options.a: “squawk five four one two, climbing to altitude four thousand five hundred feet, D-NB”.
options.b: “squawk fifty-four twelve, climbing to altitude forty-five hundred feet, D-NB”.
options.c: “squawk five four one two, climbing to altitude four five hundred feet, D-NB”.
options.d: “squawk five four one two, climbing to altitude four five zero zero feet, D-NB”.
